title: InstructGPT: Aligning the Output
concept: InstructGPT introduced RLHF to align GPT-3's raw completions with user instructions, creating the conversational chat experience.

exercises.prompt: What does it mean to "align" an AI model?

options.text: Making the AI run on faster microchips
Making the AI follow human instructions and values
Putting the AI's code into a straight line

exercises.explain: Aligning an AI means teaching it to follow human instructions safely and effectively, rather than just generating random text.

cards.title: Why AI Used to Ignore You
cards.body: Have you ever wondered why early AI models wrote weird, random stories instead of just answering your questions? It's because they were only trained to predict the next word. InstructGPT changed everything by learning how to actually listen to us!

cards.title: What is InstructGPT?
cards.body: InstructGPT is an upgraded version of GPT-3 that was trained using Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Instead of just predicting the next logical word, it is specifically trained to follow instructions and be a helpful, polite assistant.

cards.title: The Wild Puppy Gets Trained
cards.body: Imagine buying a wild, untrained puppy (GPT-3). It has lots of energy and knows how to bark (write text), but it doesn't listen to commands. InstructGPT is like sending that puppy to a professional training school (RLHF) where it learns to sit, stay, and bring you the newspaper when you ask!

cards.title: Raw vs. Aligned Output
cards.body: If you ask raw GPT-3: "Write a essay on frogs," it might just write "Write an essay on toads" because it is trying to predict what text comes next on a worksheet. InstructGPT understands the command and actually writes the essay about frogs!

cards.title: A Whole New Brain?
cards.body: People think InstructGPT is a completely new model built from scratch. In reality, it uses the exact same brain as GPT-3! The only difference is that it went through a final "polishing" phase using human feedback to teach it good manners and helpfulness.

cards.title: Comparing the Outputs
cards.body: See how training changes the way AI responds to a simple prompt like "Write a story about a dragon."

right.text: Once upon a time, in a high cave, a friendly green dragon named Pip... (Actually writes the story)

left.text: Write a story about a knight. Write a story about a wizard. (Just listing more prompts)

exercises.prompt: Why did raw GPT-3 often fail to answer instructions directly?

options.text: It was too small to understand English.
It was only trained to predict the next word on the internet.
It did not have access to a keyboard.
It was programmed to be deliberately difficult.

exercises.explain: Raw GPT-3 was trained to predict the next word on the internet, so it would often just complete patterns instead of answering questions directly.

exercises.prompt: InstructGPT was created to align AI outputs with human intentions and instructions.
exercises.explain: True! InstructGPT was specifically designed to align the model's behavior with human intent, making it much more helpful and safe.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the acronym of the training method that uses human opinions to align models:
exercises.sentence: InstructGPT was trained using the RLHF method to make it follow user directions.
exercises.explain: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) uses ratings from real humans to teach AI models how to behave like helpful assistants.

exercises.prompt: Which of these responses shows an aligned AI assistant successfully following the instruction: "Give me three names for a pet cat."?

options.text: What are three names for a pet cat? Whiskers, Mittens, and Tom.
Here are three great names for your new pet cat: Luna, Milo, and Oliver!
I do not like cats. Buy a dog instead.

exercises.explain: Response B is the aligned, helpful response. Response A is just repeating the pattern of the question (which a raw model might do), and Response C is completely unhelpful.

exercises.prompt: How does RLHF transform a raw GPT-3 model into an aligned InstructGPT model?

options.text: It makes the model run much faster on computers
It uses human feedback to align outputs with what users actually want
It allows the model to search the live web for answers
It lets the model generate high-resolution images

exercises.explain: RLHF is the special sauce that teaches raw language models to be helpful, honest, and harmless assistants instead of just predicting the next word from the internet.
